dialogs.text: A village of warriors. One day, a stranger came.
When he left, something remained. A stone. After that, things changed.
People grew quiet. The nights grew longer. And my mother… different.
That night, she ran into the dark. I remember her eyes... and the moment my father took his sword.
“Stay here,” he said. Then he disappeared into the night.
I waited. An hour. The wind still carries sounds from the village. My father hasn’t returned.
So now… I’m going after them.
